profile.title: Profile
profile.guestStatus: Sign in to sync your hero
profile.about_puf_description: Companionul tău pufos care te încurajează zilnic.
profile.select_hero_subtitle: This little friend will accompany you on your daily habits and epic quests.
profile.ageUnknown: Add your age in Edit Profile

support.title: Support
support.contactDesc: Open quick help and support paths
support.parentDashboardDesc: Open the parent tools and reports
support.loginDesc: Sign in to unlock profile settings

zen.title: Zen Zone
zen.heading: Zen Zone: Recover & Relax
zen.description: Take a moment to breathe. This is your space to let your mind wander through the stars.
zen.checkInTitle: How does your hero heart feel right now?
zen.checkInDesc: Pick your mood, then use a peaceful sound to settle your mind before sleep.
zen.rechargeDesc: Resting here regenerates your Hero's HP for tomorrow's battles.
zen.playerSubtitle: One sound at a time. Press play and let the room get quieter.
zen.audioUnsupported: This device cannot play the Zen sounds right now.
zen.audioStartError: The sound could not start. Please tap play again.
zen.audio1Hint: Soft tones are playing to help your shoulders drop and your thoughts slow down.
zen.audio2Hint: Follow the breathing cue and let your breath do the work.
zen.audio3Hint: Tiny star-like notes will drift in and out like a quiet night sky.

breathing.inhale: Breathe in slowly through your nose.
breathing.hold: Hold it softly for a moment.

zen.levelDesc: Tap the button after a calm moment and watch your meter fill up.

meterStates.low: Restless winds. Start with breathing or a soft sound.
meterStates.mid: Cozy clouds. You are settling in nicely.
meterStates.high: Moonlight calm. Your hero is ready to rest.

moodTips.restless: A slow breathing round will help first. Start gently and do not rush.
moodTips.okay: You are already halfway there. A few quiet minutes can bring full calm.
moodTips.calm: Lovely. Keep the room soft and let that peaceful feeling stay with you.

audio.title: Audio Room
audio.desc: Open the full sound player and listen without distractions.

journal.title: Dream Journal
journal.desc: Write tonight's dream later or save a magical thought now.

stretch.title: Light Stretch
stretch.desc: Do a short body reset if you still have extra energy.

home.title: Hero Home
home.desc: Head back to your dashboard when calm time is finished.

audio.title: Audio Room
audio.heading: A calm place just for listening
audio.description: Pick one sound, settle in, and let your room feel softer before bedtime.
audio.playerSubtitle: Tap play on one soundscape and pause whenever you are ready.
audio.backToZenDesc: Return to your calm check-in and Zen meter.
audio.afterDesc: When you feel sleepy, write a dream note for later.

quest.heading: Quest Board: Citadela
quest.description: Hero, your shield needs recharging! Complete tasks to power up the city.
quest.quest1Desc: Tidy the sleeping chambers for maximum rest bonus.
quest.quest2Desc: Your loyal companion requires sustenance for the journey.
quest.quest3Desc: Unlock the scrolls of wisdom and complete the ritual of learning.
quest.parentQuestsEmpty: No active quests from your parents right now. Rest well, hero!

curiosity.title: Curiosity
curiosity.desc: Discover one new thing today and ask one brave question about it.

logicalGame.title: Logical Game
logicalGame.desc: Solve a quick brain puzzle and show how sharp your hero mind can be.

memoryGame.title: Memory Game
memoryGame.desc: Remember a pattern, a list, or a story detail and repeat it without help.

quest.proTipDesc: Completing 3 quests in a row activates the "Nebula Burst" – doubling all Gold rewards for the next hour! ⚡

dream.heading: Tell me your dream 📝
dream.subtitle: Capture the magic before it fades away, then let Dream Guide answer gently.
dream.inputSubtitle: Write what you remember, even if it feels silly or scrambled.
dream.placeholder: I was flying on a giant cat...
dream.autoSaveHint: Every Dream Guide reply is saved in your journal automatically.

prompts.flying: I was flying over a bright city...
prompts.animal: A funny animal was talking to me...
prompts.door: I found a secret door in a strange place...

dream.recordingHint: You can tap the mic and tell your dream out loud.
dream.recordingActive: Listening... tell your dream in your own words.
dream.recordingUnsupported: Voice notes are not supported on this device.
dream.recordingError: The microphone could not hear clearly. Please try again.
dream.dreamGuideText: Wow, flying dreams mean you're feeling very free! 🌟 Your imagination is taking you to wonderful places.
dream.responsePlaceholder: Your Dream Guide will answer here with a magical spark, a gentle meaning, and one brave step for today.
dream.historySubtitle: Your recent dreams and Dream Guide replies live here.
dream.historyEmptyHint: Write one dream and ask Dream Guide to create your first journal page.
dream.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

training.heading: Training Ground
training.description: Build healthy habits, level up your hero, and earn XP for every challenge you crush!
training.challenge1Desc: Drink 3 glasses of water before noon to hydrate your hero.
training.challenge2Desc: Read for at least 15 minutes to boost your wisdom stat.
training.challenge3Desc: Do 10 jumping jacks to power up your agility!

parentDashboard.heading: Parent Dashboard
parentDashboard.subtitle: Monitor your child's progress and well-being
parentDashboard.noTasks: No tasks yet. Add one above!

shop.title: Rewards Shop
shop.description: Spend your hard-earned XP on epic rewards set by your parents!
shop.confirmPurchase: Are you sure you want to buy this reward?
shop.noRewards: No rewards available yet. Ask your parents to add some!
